basic_details.job_title: Tamilnad Mercantile Bank Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for Senior Relationship Manager & Data Scientist Posts
basic_details.post_name: Senior Relationship Manager: Anywhere in India; Data Scientist: Chennai
basic_details.short_information: Tamilnad Mercantile Bank Recruitment 2026 has been announced by Tamilnad Mercantile Bank Ltd (TMB) inviting online applications from dynamic and result-oriented individuals for the posts of Senior Relationship Manager and Data Scientist. Online registration opens on 3 July 2026 and closes on 18 July 2026 at www.ib.tmbonline.bank.in/tmb_careers/, with no application fee for either post.

application_fee.details: There is no application fee for either the Senior Relationship Manager or Data Scientist post.

age_limit.details: Post Age Limit (as on 30.06.2026) Senior Relationship Manager Minimum 28 years and not more than 38 years. However, in deserving cases the age may be relaxed. Data Scientist 35 years

qualification.details: Experience/Eligibility: Five years of work experience in sourcing / processing loans / MSME loans, out of which three years of experience as Relationship Manager. Tenor: Regular basis. Others: No vigilance case or adverse observation from DAC / Vigilance / RBI / Statutory Authority should be pending against the candidate for appointment as Senior Relationship Manager in the rank of SM / AVP. | Cadre: Manager. Experience (Desirable): 3 years of work experience in a Bank / any financial institution / large databases as Data Scientist. Strong programming skills in Python, R, or similar languages. Proficiency in data visualization tools like SAS, Tableau, Power BI. Experience in building predictive models to forecast future outcomes. Excellent problem-solving and analytical skills. Strong communication and interpersonal skills. | post: Educational Qualification | senior relationship manager: Any Graduate / Post Graduate from a recognized university under regular curriculum. | data scientist: Bachelor’s or Master’s degree in Data Science, Computer Science, Statistics, or a related field.

selection_process: Shortlisted candidates for both posts will be called to appear for a personal interview
conducted through Direct mode or Video Conferencing. The mode of interview
and time will be communicated to eligible candidates individually.
how_to_apply: Candidates must apply online only through the TMB careers portal at www.ib.tmbonline.bank.in/tmb_careers/. No other mode of submission will be accepted by the Bank.

– Before applying, go through the detailed advertisement by clicking "Download Advertisement" under the title "Recruitment Advertisement" on the careers portal, and confirm your eligibility for the post.

Register on the Portal – Log on to the Bank’s website, click "Apply Online," and register for the appropriate post using a valid personal email ID and contact number, which should remain active till completion of the recruitment process.

Activate Your Registration – On successful registration, an activation link will be sent to the registered email ID, and a Registration Number and Password will be sent to the registered mobile number. Candidates should note these details carefully, as they cannot proceed without them.

Log In and Fill the Application – Click the activation link to reach the Careers portal, then log in using the Registration Number/Username and Password. Fill in all details carefully, using "Save/Continue" on each page. Ensure the candidate’s name and father’s/husband’s name are spelt exactly as per certificates/mark sheets, as any discrepancy may lead to disqualification.

Upload Photograph, Signature & Documents – Upload the photograph (390 x 520 pixels, max 120 KB) and signature (240 x 240 pixels, max 60 KB, not in capital letters), along with the required enclosures listed in the Documents Required section (each max 250 KB).

Submit the Application – Click "Confirm/Submit" at the bottom of the page. A message confirming "Registration is successful" will be displayed, and a copy of the system-generated application form will be emailed to the registered address. Candidates should take a printout for future reference.
important_instructions: Canvassing in any form will result in disqualification. The job role and location are subject to transfer based on the Bank’s requirements. The application should reach the Bank on or before 18 July 2026. Candidates must adhere strictly to the eligibility conditions given; any wrong information, or a candidate found ineligible at any stage of the process or later, will result in disqualification. E-applications with incorrect or incomplete particulars, or without the required certificate copies attached, are liable to be rejected. The Bank reserves the right to reject any application without assigning any reason, and the Bank’s decision on eligibility, interview, and selection will be final. The Bank also reserves the right to eliminate ineligible candidates at any point before, during, or after the personal interview/selection. E-applications will be scrutinized, and shortlisted applicants will be communicated individually by post/email with interview details. No correspondence in this regard will be entertained by the Bank.

rows.details: Senior Relationship Manager: Anywhere in India; Data Scientist: Chennai

content_sections.heading: Eligibility Criteria
content_sections.text: Experience/Eligibility: Five years of work experience in sourcing / processing loans / MSME loans, out of which three years of experience as Relationship Manager. Tenor: Regular basis. Others: No vigilance case or adverse observation from DAC / Vigilance / RBI / Statutory Authority should be pending against the candidate for appointment as Senior Relationship Manager in the rank of SM / AVP. Cadre: Manager. Experience (Desirable): 3 years of work experience in a Bank / any financial institution / large databases as Data Scientist. Strong programming skills in Python, R, or similar languages. Proficiency in data visualization tools like SAS, Tableau, Power BI. Experience in building predictive models to forecast future outcomes. Excellent problem-solving and analytical skills. Strong communication and interpersonal skills.

rows.educational_qualification: Any Graduate / Post Graduate from a recognized university under regular curriculum.
Bachelor’s or Master’s degree in Data Science, Computer Science, Statistics, or a related field.

rows.age_limit_as_on_30_06_2026: Minimum 28 years and not more than 38 years. However, in deserving cases the age may be relaxed.

content_sections.heading: Application Fee
content_sections.text: There is no application fee for either the Senior Relationship Manager or Data Scientist post.

content_sections.heading: Roles & Responsibilities of Senior Relationship Managers
content_sections.text: To proactively identify and approach potential clients with substantial credit requirements, building a strong network. To cultivate existing business relationships with customers. To nurture relationships with existing high-value customers, understanding their evolving needs, and identifying opportunities for cross-selling and upselling credit products and services. To achieve and exceed annual revenue and business targets, increasing the share in the high-value credit segment. To guide new clients through a seamless and efficient onboarding process. To oversee and manage the allotted high-value credit portfolio, including servicing customer requirements and maintaining asset quality. To expertly negotiate credit terms, conditions, interest rates, and loan agreements with clients. To ensure high-quality customer service and review customer complaints to maintain satisfaction and increase business. To contribute to the development and implementation of strategies to expand the client base and deepen relationships. To prepare and present reports on account performance, sales activities, and market insights. To actively participate in industry events and networking to expand professional connections and attract new clients. Any other roles that may be assigned by the Bank.

content_sections.heading: Selection Process
content_sections.text: Shortlisted candidates for both posts will be called to appear for a personal interview , conducted through Direct mode or Video Conferencing. The mode of interview, date, and time will be communicated to eligible candidates individually.

content_sections.heading: Documents Required
content_sections.text: Candidates must upload the following self-attested enclosures along with the e-application (each scanned image not exceeding 250 KB): Self-attested photo copy of SSLC or Higher Secondary Mark Sheet / Transfer Certificate, for age proof Self-attested photo copy of Degree Certificate(s) Experience Certificate(s) and Relieving Letter for previous employment(s) Last Month Salary Slip In addition, candidates must upload: Photograph with dimensions of 390 x 520 pixels (preferred), with scanned image size not exceeding 120 KB Signature with dimensions of 240 x 240 pixels (preferred), with scanned image size not exceeding 60 KB. Signatures in capital letters will NOT be accepted.

content_sections.heading: How to Apply Online
content_sections.text: Candidates must apply online only through the TMB careers portal at www.ib.tmbonline.bank.in/tmb_careers/ . No other mode of submission will be accepted by the Bank.

content_sections.heading: Important Instructions
content_sections.text: Canvassing in any form will result in disqualification. The job role and location are subject to transfer based on the Bank’s requirements. The application should reach the Bank on or before 18 July 2026 . Candidates must adhere strictly to the eligibility conditions given; any wrong information, or a candidate found ineligible at any stage of the process or later, will result in disqualification. E-applications with incorrect or incomplete particulars, or without the required certificate copies attached, are liable to be rejected. The Bank reserves the right to reject any application without assigning any reason, and the Bank’s decision on eligibility, interview, and selection will be final. The Bank also reserves the right to eliminate ineligible candidates at any point before, during, or after the personal interview/selection. E-applications will be scrutinized, and shortlisted applicants will be communicated individually by post/email with interview details. No correspondence in this regard will be entertained by the Bank.

content_sections.heading: TMB Senior Relationship Manager & Data Scientist Recruitment 2026 - FAQs
content_sections.text: 1. What is the starting date to apply online for TMB Senior Relationship Manager & Data Scientist 2026? Ans: Starting Date to apply online is 03-07-2026. 2. What is the last online apply date for TMB Senior Relationship Manager & Data Scientist 2026? Ans: Last online apply date is 18-07-2026. 3. What is the Eligibility to apply for TMB Senior Relationship Manager & Data Scientist 2026? Ans: Any Graduate, B.Sc, Any Post Graduate, M.Sc 4. What is the Maximum Age Limit to apply for TMB Senior Relationship Manager & Data Scientist 2026 ? Ans: 38 Years 5. How many vacancies are being recruited by TMB Senior Relationship Manager & Data Scientist 2026? Ans: Total Not Mentioned Vacancies.

faq.question: Q1. hat is the last date to apply for Tamilnad Mercantile Bank Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The online application closes on 18 July 2026. Registration opened on 3 July 2026.

faq.question: Q2. What is the age limit for the Senior Relationship Manager post at TMB?
faq.answer: The age limit is a minimum of 28 years and a maximum of 38 years as on 30 June 2026, though the age may be relaxed in deserving cases.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for the Data Scientist post at TMB?
faq.answer: The age limit is 35 years as on 30 June 2026.

faq.question: Q4. Is there an application fee for Tamilnad Mercantile Bank Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee for either the Senior Relationship Manager or Data Scientist post.

faq.question: Q5. What is the educational qualification required for the Data Scientist post?
faq.answer: Candidates need a Bachelor’s or Master’s degree in Data Science, Computer Science, Statistics, or a related field.

faq.question: Q6. What is the selection process for TMB Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: Shortlisted candidates will be called for a personal interview, conducted either directly or through Video Conferencing.

faq.question: Q7. Where will the Data Scientist be posted?
faq.answer: The place of posting for the Data Scientist post is Chennai, while the Senior Relationship Manager may be posted anywhere in India.

faq.question: Q8. How can I apply for Tamilnad Mercantile Bank Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: Eligible candidates must apply online only through the official careers portal at www.ib.tmbonline.bank.in/tmb_careers/. No other mode of application will be accepted.
